en: This includes requiring a company/business license to operate your particular trade or service, including Asbestos Removal License, Building License, Demolition License, Electrical License, Plumbing License etc.</br>\nIf you answer “Yes”, you will be required to select the state(s)/territories where your company works and is required to maintain a Company Contractor License in and provide copies of your Company Contractor License(s) for the Australian state(s)/territory(ies) which you select.
Does your company maintain any Company Contractor Licenses in Australia?

Each state/territory lists the type of company contractor license collected on behalf of your client(s). For each state/territory in which your company holds a listed company contractor license, please tick the box.

For each state(s)/territory(ies) selected below, a form will be generated for you to provide your company contractor license number, the expiration date of the license, and upload a copy of your physical license.
Please select the state(s)/territory(ies) where your company currently maintains a Company Contractor License:
